entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (P00103) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2014 TO 6/16/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION A OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION P00102, TO INCLUDE PRICING FOR PER BORROWER ADJUSTMENT AND PER BORROWER REVERSAL ASSOCIATED WITH CR 4583 AND PRICING FOR CHANGE REQUEST (CR) 4583.
CR 4583: THE PURPOSE OF THIS CR IS TO IDENTIFY BORROWERS IMPACTED BY NATURAL DISASTERS AND TO PROCESS ALL NEW DISCHARGE TYPE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (P00104) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2014 TO 6/16/2019.
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE FAR CLAUSE 52.204-23 INTO CONTRACT NUMBER ED-FSA-09-D-0014

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (P00106) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2014 TO 6/16/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION TO CONTRACT NUMBER ED-FSA-09-D-0014 IS AS FOLLOWS: TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION A OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION P00103, TO INCLUDE PRICING FOR TEMPORARY EXPANDED PSLF [TEPPSLF] FOR INITIAL RECONSIDERATION REVIEW, IDR PAYMENT CALCULATION, DETAILED PAYMENT REVIEW, POSTAL MAILING COSTS ASSOCIATED WITH CR 4640 AND INCORPORATE THE REQUIREMENTS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (P00108) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2009 TO 6/16/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO DO THE FOLLOWING:
1. INCORPORATE FSA LOCAL CLAUSE 39-7 (REVISION 1), CONTRACTOR SECURITY RESPONSIBILITIES (AUG 2018)
2. INCORPORATE FSA LOCAL CLAUSE 39-8 (REVISION 1), SUPPLEMENTAL INSTRUCTIONS TO EDAR 3452.239-72, DEPARTMENT SECURITY REQUIREMENTS (AUG 2018)

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (P00111) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2009 TO 6/16/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION B OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION P00110, TO INCLUDE PRICING FOR CHANGE REQUEST (CR) 4909.
CR 4909: ADDRESS THE UNRESOLVED CONVERSION ERRORS THAT OCCURRED WHEN THE DESIGNATED TEACH GRANT SERVICER WAS ACS AND TO RECONSIDER TEACH GRANT CONVERSION IN INSTANCES WHERE TEACH GRANT RECIPIENTS WHO WERE MEETING PROGRAM REQUIREMENTS, AS DEFINED BY THE AUTHORIZING STATUTE AND REGULATIONS THEREOF, BUT FOR SOME REASON FAILED TO MEET THE CERTIFICATION DEADLINES ESTABLISHED BY THE OPERATING CONSTRAINTS OF THE PROGRAM

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (P00113) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2009 TO 6/16/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION TO CONTRACT NUMBER ED-FSA-09-D-0014 IS AS FOLLOWS:
1. TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION B OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION P00111, TO INCLUDE PRICING FOR CHANGE REQUEST (CR) 5044.
2. TO INCORPORATE THE REQUIREMENTS OF CR 5044 ECF HOLD FOR NON 501(C) 3 NON-PROFITS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION TO CONTRACT NUMBER ED-FSA-09-D-0014 IS REINSERT CLN D030 WITHIN TABLE B THAT WAS INADVERTENTLY OVERWRITTEN IN MOD P00113.
